projectDescription: A powerful Python string-templating and mapping utility that resolves placeholders using layered data maps, custom syntax patterns, pipelines, and built-in color and time maps.
keyFeatures: Flexible placeholder resolution with multiple built-in syntax styles (braces, dollars, angles, percents)
Layered map system with priority ordering for override and fallback resolution
DataMap decorator (@datamap) for defining typed template contexts as Python dataclasses
Pipeline system for chaining custom text transformation stages
Built-in ColorMap for ANSI terminal and Minecraft color code substitution
Built-in TimeMap for dynamic date/time placeholder resolution with timezone support
LRU caching for high-throughput repeated resolution
Recursive multi-pass resolution up to a configurable depth
Global convenience resolver (res) for zero-setup usage
publicApiSurface: MapResolver(layers, syntax, pipeline, cache, cache_size, max_depth)
maps namespace (maps.ColorMap, maps.TimeMap, maps.ascii_colors, maps.mc_colors, maps.strip_colors, maps.time)
